message:
feat: implement failover/failback logic and status health visibility

- Add RuntimeState for dynamic proxy switching during failover
- Implement check_and_perform_failover() for automatic failover
- Implement check_and_perform_failback() with configurable delay
- Add find_best_healthy_proxy() for priority-based selection
- Integrate failover/failback into health check loop
- Update status command with health information display
- Support both human-readable tables and JSON output

(rust_proxy-b5m.4, rust_proxy-b5m.5, rust_proxy-b5m.6)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
